title: FOCUS-aligned advisory export manifest (v0.1)
description: Sidecar contract for finops-assess export focus-aligned output. manifest_schema_version '0.1' is additive-only: new top-level keys may be added in future releases without a version bump; consumers MUST ignore unknown keys. Enum values on existing keys (e.g. pii_handling.mode, conformance_level) may also expand under additive releases — strict consumers MUST widen their accepted value set rather than treating unknown enum values as errors. A breaking change (field rename, removal, type change, or incompatible semantic shift) increments manifest_schema_version to '0.2' and is documented in CHANGELOG.md.

manifest_schema_version.description: Schema version. '0.1' for v0.5.0. Bump to '0.2' only on a breaking change.

generated_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC ISO-8601 timestamp at second precision. Honours SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH.

path.description: Path to the source report JSON (may be redacted by upstream run).

schema_version.description: schema_version from the source report run block.

pii_redaction.description: Echoes pii_redaction from the source report run block.

dataset_type.description: Distinguishes advisory datasets from FOCUS billing Cost-and-Usage datasets.

focus_version.description: FOCUS spec version this export is shaped against.

conformance_level.description: FOCUS conformance level. Only 'non-conformant' is legal in v0.5.0. Future values: 'partial', 'conformant'. Consumers MUST accept unknown values (forward-compatible read).

conformance_rationale.description: Human-readable explanation of why this export is non-conformant.

surfaces_included.description: Alphabetically sorted list of cloud surfaces included in this export. v0.5.0: ['azure'].

surfaces_skipped.description: Per-surface count of findings filtered out. Keys are alphabetically ordered.

row_count.description: Number of rows in the sibling CSV (excluding header).

unsupported_columns.description: FOCUS columns that are intentionally empty or absent in this export.

stability.description: Stability contract. Known values: 'stable', 'per_run', 'best_effort'. Consumers MUST accept unknown values.

pii_handling.description: PII handling policy for this export. v0.5.0 emits 'azure_resource_id_cleartext' when --no-pii-redaction is set, and 'azure_resource_id_per_run_salted_hash' under default redaction (engine salts every principal — including Azure resource IDs — with a per-run secret; see #73 for engine tenant-stable salting). 'known_limitation' is non-null whenever the mode produces per-run instability. Consumers MUST accept unknown keys and unknown mode values (forward-compatible read).

mode.description: PII handling mode. v0.5.0 values: 'azure_resource_id_cleartext' (--no-pii-redaction) or 'azure_resource_id_per_run_salted_hash' (default redaction). v0.6.0 will add 'stable_salt'. Consumers MUST accept unknown values.

known_limitation.description: Non-null when the mode produces per-run instability (Azure resource IDs hashed with a per-run salt). The string MUST reference issue #73 and warn that re-runs will produce duplicate advisory rows. Null when the mode is cleartext.

non_additive_warning.description: Always true: summing EstimatedMonthlySavingsUsd across rows may double-count when conflict classes fire.

column_order.description: Authoritative declaration of CSV column order.

evidence_key_fields.description: Hash inputs for AdvisoryFindingKey. v0.5.0: ['rule_id','resource_id','normalized_evidence']. Will extend in v0.6.0 if evidence_key_version is mixed in.

evidence_key_algorithm.description: Free-form description of the AdvisoryFindingKey hash algorithm.
